info.description:
**Limitations:**
  • You are allowed to make 2 requests per second (120 per minute).
  • You must respect our 429 response codes, which indicate rate limiting. The `Retry-After` header will specify when to retry.
**Requirements for All Requests:**
  • Each request must include a `User-Agent` header identifying the client making the request. Requests lacking this header or generic headers name may be rejected .
    Please use company Id (client id) or if you a provider - your provider name
For further details, please refer to our documentation or contact support at support@istores.co.il.

ProductOptionsValues.description: Single object with details of the current option value
